title: elodea matthewsii
intro: Elodea matthewsii, also known as Canadian waterweed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Elodea genus. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the heart and increase cardiac output due to its high concentration of iridoids, specifically elodine. The health benefits of Elodea matthewsii include its potential to treat conditions such as heart failure, angina, and even high blood pressure due to its vasodilatory effects. Elodea matthewsii can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or tincture, with some practitioners recommending it as a treatment for various cardiovascular conditions, however its efficacy and safety require further research.
